'''Toys "R" Us''' is a company that sells toys. It has released four exclusive ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic books]] alongside [[Hasbro]]. One was [[Practice Makes Perfect (comic book)|''Practice Makes Perfect'']], which contained the first image of [[Kel Dor/Legends|Kel Dor]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]] without his mask.

{{Company-stub|real}}
